lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has a few minor scratches but no major dents. The interior shows light wear from regular use. All mechanical systems are functioning properly.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior looks great overall, though there are a few minor stone chips on the hood and a small scuff on the rear bumper consistent with careful use. Mechanically, the car is very solid; it has a complete service history, and the engine and transmission perform smoothly. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, with only light wear on the driver's seat bolster. All electronics, including the navigation and heated seats, work perfectly. It is a reliable, well-kept car that offers a great balance of quality and value.

This vehicle is in fair condition, serving reliably as a daily commuter but showing its age. The exterior paint has some oxidation on the hood and roof, and there are several door dings and a noticeable scuff on the rear bumper. Inside, the fabric seats show some staining and the driver's side bolster has a small tear, though all electronics and climate controls remain functional. Mechanically, the car starts and runs well, but it will likely need new brake pads and a set of tires within the next 5,000 miles. It is a solid, honest vehicle for someone who prioritizes utility over aesthetics and is willing to keep up with routine maintenance.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows significant wear and staining. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are functional and the vehicle is drivable.

Get ready for a reliable ride that's ready to work for you! This car is in fair condition, showing some honest character and wear from its journeys, but it remains a dependable choice for your daily needs. It’s a great opportunity to own a solid vehicle that still has plenty of road ahead of it. Perfect for a practical buyer!

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure consistent performance and operational reliability. Featuring a clean interior cabin and a well-preserved exterior finish, this offering represents a superior value proposition for the discerning driver who demands both quality and longevity.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that's been super well-loved? This beauty is ready for its next adventure! It’s in great shape, runs like a dream, and has plenty of life left in it. I’ve taken really good care of it, and it definitely shows. It's perfect for daily commutes or fun weekend getaways! Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it handles!

Available is a 987.1-generation Cayman S, powered by the 3.4L M97.21 naturally aspirated flat-six engine. This mid-engine platform offers an exceptional polar moment of inertia, paired with a tactile 6-speed Getrag manual transaxle and a factory-spec limited-slip differential. The hydraulic steering rack delivers the communicative feedback modern EPS systems lack. Mechanically, the vehicle is sorted with a recently replaced high-flow Air-Oil Separator (AOS) and a clean borescope report confirming no scoring on the Nikasil-coated cylinder walls. The suspension retains its composure via MacPherson struts and stiffened anti-roll bars, while the braking system features four-piston monobloc calipers with excellent thermal capacity. While the exterior shows minor road-derived patina, the drivetrain remains robust, showing consistent oil pressure and a dry rear main seal.
Used car in good condition. Regularly maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

This vehicle represents a well-maintained and reliable choice for any discerning driver. The exterior finish remains vibrant and glossy, showing only minor, age-appropriate signs of use such as small stone chips on the front bumper. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the upholstery is free of tears, and the dashboard remains crack-free. All electronic features, including the ice-cold air conditioning, power windows, and the premium infotainment system, are in perfect working order. Mechanically, the car is solid; it has been serviced regularly with synthetic oil changes and a recent brake service. The engine runs smoothly without any leaks or warning lights, and the transmission provides seamless shifts. With a clean title and a full set of tires with deep tread, this car is ready for the road today.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and functional excellence. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. With a documented service history and a well-preserved interior, this vehicle offers a sophisticated driving experience and exceptional long-term value. We invite you to experience the superior road manners and structural integrity of this distinguished offering.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers exceptional reliability and performance. A distinguished choice for those who value both quality and value in a pre-owned executive transport.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been such a reliable companion! It’s in really solid shape, super clean inside, and drives smooth as butter. I’ve taken great care of it with regular maintenance, so it's ready to hit the road with its next owner today. Perfect for anyone looking for a dependable, great-looking car that's ready for any adventure. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love it!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333 hp through individual throttle bodies with a linear power band and an 8,000 RPM redline. Mechanically robust, it benefits from a recently serviced VANOS system and reinforced rear subframe mounting points to ensure structural integrity. The 6-speed Getrag manual transmission offers precise shift gates, paired with a variable M differential lock for optimal power delivery. The suspension remains taut with refreshed bushings, while cross-drilled
Used car. Good condition. Well maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday reliability. Finished in a deep metallic gloss, the exterior retains its original luster, though a discerning eye might find a few minor stone chips consistent with careful highway use. Inside, the cabin is a pristine, non-smoking environment; the leather upholstery has been regularly conditioned and shows only light bolstering wear on the driver’s seat. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system, functions exactly as it should. Mechanically, the car is sound, having followed a strict manufacturer service schedule. We recently completed a full synthetic oil change and a multi-point inspection, confirming the brakes and tires are in solid shape for the road ahead. This is a turn-key vehicle for a buyer who appreciates a car that has been genuinely cared for.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing an exceptional balance of performance and value. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure continued reliability and mechanical integrity. The exterior retains its original luster, complemented by a clean, well-preserved interior. This is a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-quality pre-owned automobile.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. This example has been kept to rigorous standards, ensuring a refined driving experience and a well-preserved aesthetic. Having undergone a comprehensive professional inspection, it stands as a testament to quality engineering and responsible ownership. This represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver seeking reliability without compromise.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a dream to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my daily commutes and weekend trips. It’s got a few minor signs of love here and there as you'd expect, but it runs beautifully and is totally ready for its next adventure. You’re going to love how smooth it feels on the road! Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and take it for a spin!

Used car in good condition. Regularly serviced. Reliable performance. Minimal cosmetic wear. Clean title.

This vehicle represents a well-maintained balance of performance and comfort, having been kept in consistent, reliable condition throughout its ownership. The exterior retains a deep luster with only minor, expected road wear that does not detract from its impressive curb appeal. Inside, the cabin remains a refined space; the premium upholstery is supple, the climate control is crisp, and all electronic interfaces function exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is sound, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule that ensures a smooth, responsive driving experience. It has been treated with the care of a dedicated owner, making it a dependable choice for someone seeking quality and longevity.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in superior road-ready condition, it balances refined aesthetics with proven mechanical integrity. A distinguished choice for those who demand both excellence and consistent performance from their automotive investments.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a harmonious balance of performance and value. Having undergone a comprehensive mechanical assessment, this unit demonstrates robust operational integrity and remains in commendable aesthetic form. It represents an ideal acquisition for the professional seeking a reliable, high-caliber driving experience without compromise. This offering stands as a testament to our commitment to quality and enduring automotive excellence.

Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for my trusty car. It’s been such a reliable ride for me and is still in really solid shape! It drives super smoothly and has been very well-loved over the years. If you're looking for a dependable daily driver that still looks great on the road, this is definitely the one for you. I'd love to see it go to someone who will enjoy it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and take it for a spin!

This E46-generation M3 is a mechanically robust example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and double VANOS optimization. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal torque distribution. Recent service includes critical preventative maintenance such as rod bearing replacement and rear subframe reinforcement to maintain structural rigidity. The suspension maintains its factory-tuned damping profiles, offering exceptional turn-in and communicative feedback through the hydraulic steering rack. A driver-quality specimen that balances raw performance with mechanical longevity.
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Runs well. Minor cosmetic wear. Regular maintenance performed.

This 2018 BMW M240i is a stunning example of a well-maintained performance coupe. Finished in Mineral Grey Metallic, the exterior retains a deep, glossy shine, showing only the lightest signs of road use expected for its mileage. The cabin is a sanctuary of Black Dakota leather, which remains supple and free of any odors or significant blemishes. Mechanically, this vehicle is in excellent health; it has been strictly serviced at recommended intervals, with a documented history to prove it. The turbocharged inline-six engine pulls strongly and the 8-speed transmission shifts with clinical precision. It currently sits on factory-spec wheels wrapped in high-quality performance tires with plenty of life remaining. Whether you're looking for a spirited weekend driver or a sophisticated daily commuter, this car delivers an engaging, worry-free experience. Garage-kept and smoke-free, it is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both reliability and sophisticated engineering. This exceptional example has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and cabin integrity. Offering a balanced combination of luxury and proven durability, it stands as a testament to conscientious ownership. Secure a vehicle that promises a refined driving experience and enduring value.
